relationship_method.event_next_event: Each transaction connects to the immediately next transaction in global time order.
relationship_method.event_prev_event: Reverse global temporal edges allow backward message passing.
relationship_method.event_next_same_source: Each source-specific transaction sequence is linked in time order.
relationship_method.event_prev_same_source: Reverse same-source temporal edges allow backward message passing.
relationship_method.event_next_same_target: Each target-specific transaction sequence is linked in time order.
relationship_method.event_prev_same_target: Reverse same-target temporal edges allow backward message passing.
relationship_method.event_from_source: Each event connects to its source entity.
relationship_method.event_to_target: Each event connects to its target entity.
